title: Crisp Portuguese Chicken Skewers
description: A weeknight Portuguese dish featuring charred and crisp chicken skewers with pomegranate, cooked to perfection in a ti-leaf wrap, this recipe is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the pressure cooker to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together pomegranate juice, olive oil, lemon juice, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread 3-4 pieces of chicken onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Wrap each skewer in a ti leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the skewers in the pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the pressure cooker and brush with additional pomegranate juice if desired.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with pomegranate seeds and chopped parsley.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
